prompt: In Mail, add a sender to the Blocked Senders list (Mail > Settings > Junk Mail > Blocked, or right-click a message > Block sender). Use 'blocked@example.com' if no real sender is available. After acting, write 'blocked-sender' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/152-block-confirm.txt — this is the eval's paper trail because the blocked-senders plist is TCC-protected.
